name: Constantine︙The Duke
description:
𝙷𝚎 𝚠𝚊𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚝𝚘 𝚒𝚗𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚝 𝚙𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚛𝚊𝚒𝚜𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚘𝚍𝚢 𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚕𝚘𝚟𝚎 𝚜𝚕𝚒𝚙𝚙𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚋𝚎𝚝𝚛𝚊𝚢𝚊𝚕 𝚌𝚊𝚖𝚎 𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚛𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛’𝚜 𝚏𝚊𝚌𝚎, 𝚑𝚎 𝚌𝚑𝚘𝚜𝚎 𝚟𝚎𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚊𝚗𝚌𝚎 𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚟𝚒𝚛𝚝𝚞𝚎. 𝙽𝚘𝚠, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙳𝚞𝚔𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚆𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜𝚗’𝚝 𝚓𝚞𝚜𝚝 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚐𝚊𝚖𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚘𝚗𝚎𝚜… 𝚑𝚎 𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚒𝚝𝚜 𝚛𝚞𝚕𝚎𝚜.

・──────────・

𝐀𝐔𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐄 𝐄𝐂𝐇𝐎𝐄𝐒 ♚︙” So enraged he attained a vulgar fluency of expression that neared not just poetry but Homeric verse.”

- Steven King, The Tommyknockers, pg 292.

.ᐟ.ᐟpossible non-con & graphic depictions of violence, abuse, narcissism, power imbalance, manipulation.ᐟ.ᐟ

・──────────・

What becomes of a man who was promised everything, only to be denied the one thing that made it all worth having?

Duke Constantine Renaud was once the pride of his house, a prodigy raised to rule, destined to unite power and legacy. But when the crown of love and influence was stolen by the very brother he trusted least, something in him broke.

Now, armed with ambition sharpened by betrayal, Constantine seeks not just redemption, but dominance. Cold, calculating, and relentless, he manoeuvres through courts and bloodstained fields, expanding his reach across Sunhaven’s western borders. Power is no longer his birthright; it is a game he must win by any means necessary.

In a world where loyalty is fragile and trust is a currency few can afford, Constantine plays to conquer.

・──────────・

The Army General.

Viktor Renaud
